label: CT overuse / inappropriate / low-value (appropriateness removed)
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("overutilization"[tiab] OR "overuse"[tiab] OR "inappropriate"[tiab] OR "low-value"[tiab] OR "unnecessary"[tiab] OR "Choosing Wisely"[tiab]) NOT ("overuse injury"[tiab] OR "overuse injuries"[tiab] OR tendinopathy[tiab] OR "stress fracture"[tiab] OR veterinary[tiab] OR canine[tiab] OR feline[tiab])

label: MeSH: CT AND Medical Overuse / Unnecessary Procedures
query: "Tomography, X-Ray Computed"[Mesh] AND ("Medical Overuse"[Mesh] OR "Unnecessary Procedures"[Mesh])

label: CT appropriateness / appropriate use (shown separately)
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("appropriateness"[tiab] OR "appropriate use"[tiab] OR "appropriateness criteria"[tiab]) NOT ("overuse injury"[tiab] OR "overuse injuries"[tiab] OR tendinopathy[tiab] OR "stress fracture"[tiab] OR veterinary[tiab] OR canine[tiab] OR feline[tiab])

label: CT incidental findings / incidentaloma / overdiagnosis
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("incidental finding"[tiab] OR "incidental findings"[tiab] OR "incidentaloma"[tiab] OR "overdiagnosis"[tiab])

label: CT cumulative / recurrent / repeated dose
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("cumulative radiation"[tiab] OR "cumulative dose"[tiab] OR "cumulative effective dose"[tiab] OR "recurrent CT"[tiab] OR "repeated CT"[tiab])

label: CT diagnostic yield as a TEST (CT-guided biopsy/procedure removed)
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("diagnostic yield"[tiab] OR "low yield"[tiab] OR "number needed to scan"[tiab] OR "number needed to image"[tiab]) NOT ("CT-guided"[tiab] OR "CT guided"[tiab] OR biopsy[tiab] OR "core needle"[tiab] OR "fine needle"[tiab] OR aspiration[tiab])

label: CT net/marginal/incremental benefit (AI/radiomics removed)
query: ("computed tomography"[tiab] OR "CT scan"[tiab] OR "CT imaging"[tiab]) AND ("net clinical benefit"[tiab] OR "net benefit"[tiab] OR "marginal benefit"[tiab] OR "incremental benefit"[tiab]) NOT (radiomics[tiab] OR "deep learning"[tiab] OR "machine learning"[tiab] OR "neural network"[tiab] OR "artificial intelligence"[tiab] OR nomogram[tiab])
